title: Project Cabinet coherence status in Leitstand read-only
goal: Expose Cabinet map/frontier, Bureau queue/import state, PR/CI status and agent-lane state as a read-only Leitstand projection.

metadata.safety_boundary: gated design and registration only; no dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, credential exposure or automatic queue mutation
metadata.schauwerk_boundary: not claimed; requires separate Bureau resource and task if selected later
metadata.supersession_reason: Leitstand reads source systems directly; Systemkatalog no longer owns frontier, queue, PR, CI or agent status.

acceptance.assertion: Projection distinguishes Cabinet canon, Bureau registry, GitHub/CI facts, runtime facts and display state.
The projection cannot approve, dispatch, import, merge or mutate queue/runtime state.
Blocked candidates and missing evidence are visible instead of smoothed over.
The Ecosystem Registry Map remains linked as the orientation surface.
Task does not claim a Schauwerk write surface unless that resource is registered separately.
The projection distinguishes Gemini preflight blocked, unavailable, available and proposal-only states.
